priceBasis: Representative current retail estimates by country, utility type, and selected place. Exact prices still depend on address, meter, tariff, contract term, discounts, and provider acceptance.
priceSources: NZ electricity benchmark checked against Canstar NZ and MBIE price-monitoring guidance, June 2026.
AU electricity benchmark checked against AER Default Market Offer 2026-27 and current NBN retail comparison data.
UK electricity/gas benchmark checked against Ofgem July-September 2026 price-cap unit rates.
US electricity benchmark checked against EIA Electric Power Monthly March 2026 residential prices.

Water rows checked against current municipal/regulated water charging references including Watercare, ESC Victoria, Ofwat/Water UK, US EPA WaterSense/AWWA guidance, and Canadian municipal 2026 rate schedules.
Broadband/mobile rows are representative retail shelf prices, not guaranteed live quotes.
